name: LAEF Starting Guide
author: LAEF
description: Starting guide by LAEF. Covers early hunter, rumours, wealthy citizens, and core progression.

items.note: Open the Leagues Menu found within the Journal Panel
Complete the Leagues Tutorial and begin your adventure

Claim a Spade, Impling jar and Strange device from Tutor
